since_last: 60% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.26%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.78% · Gold +1.23% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 60% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.26%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.26%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +7.92%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +7.92%, SKHY +7.46%, AMAT +7.19%, MU +6.93%, LRCX +6.92%. Laggards: WDAY -5.58%, ADBE -5.00%, INTU -4.04%, CRM -3.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.42% at $122.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
